title: SCP-427, Lovecraftian Locket
description: A locket that heals you… until it reshapes you into something unrecognizable.
body:
Lovecraftian Locket adds a new item. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-427, also known as the Lovecraftian Locket.


At first, SCP-427 seems like a powerful artifact. Carrying it open in the inventory grants regeneration, cures harmful effects, and over time enhances the player with night vision, saturation, strength and more.
But the longer it stays open, the more unstable the transformation becomes. After several minutes, the player receives a mutation warning, and shortly after, SCP-427 kills the host and turning it into SCP-427-1, a horrific creature born from your body. This makes SCP-427 a dangerous double-edged tool with great power in the short term, but deadly if overused.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-427 spawn?

SCP-427 can spawn anywhere in the overworld like a normal monster. However, there can only be one instance of SCP-427.

</details>



![SCP-427](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61997e544f074945b48badea7f341fc34051f752.png)

SCP-427 appears as a small, ornate silver locket that can be found laying on the ground. When right-clicking, you can pick up SCP-427 and place it on the ground while sneaking and the Locket is closed. Right-click SCP-427 without sneaking will open it. Starting with regeneration and after 30 seconds, it removes poison and wither. After 90 seconds, it will grant night vision and saturation. After 3 minutes of being opend, it will grant strength, speed, haste and dolphines grace. If SCP-427 is opend even longer, it will display a warning message to the user after 3 minutes and 40 seconds before killing the user and turning it into a SCP-427-1 Instance after 4 minutes of using. 


 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
